title: Myntra Festive Campaign 2024
note: A full-cycle campaign blending AI-generated visuals with live photoshoots for the festive season.

seo.title: Myntra Festive Campaign 2024 — Tara Devi
seo.description: A full-cycle fashion campaign blending AI visuals and live photoshoots for Myntra's festive season.
seo.keywords: Myntra, Fashion Campaign, Art Direction, Creative Direction, Tara Devi

description: Led the end-to-end creative direction for Myntra's festive campaign, from concept development to final delivery. Integrated AI-generated backgrounds with live model shoots to create a cohesive, high-impact visual narrative across digital and print platforms.
plan: Conducted mood-board research and trend analysis for the festive season
Developed concept brief aligning with Myntra's brand identity and campaign goals
Coordinated AI background generation pipeline alongside live model shoot schedules
Managed cross-functional teams across photography, post-production, and digital delivery
strategy: Positioned the campaign around warmth and celebration using a rich jewel-tone palette
Blended AI-generated environments with real talent to cut production time by 30%
Rolled out assets across Instagram, app banners, and print simultaneously for maximum reach

title: Citykart Brand Identity Refresh
note: Complete visual identity overhaul for one of India's leading fashion retail chains.

seo.title: Citykart Brand Identity Refresh — Tara Devi
seo.description: Complete brand identity refresh and campaign direction for Citykart fashion retail.
seo.keywords: Citykart, Brand Identity, Creative Director, Fashion, Tara Devi

description: Spearheaded a comprehensive brand identity refresh for Citykart over 3.5 years, defining the visual language across in-store, digital, and campaign materials. Used CGI and VFX to elevate campaign films beyond conventional retail aesthetics.
plan: Audited existing brand assets and identified inconsistencies across touchpoints
Defined a new visual language — typography, colour system, and iconography
Created brand guidelines and handed off to in-house and agency teams
Supervised rollout across 200+ stores and all digital channels
strategy: Differentiated Citykart from competitors by leaning into bold, locally resonant visual storytelling
Used CGI and VFX to achieve premium aesthetics on a mid-market budget
Built a scalable design system to ensure brand consistency at every scale

title: AI & VFX Fashion Film
note: An experimental fashion film using cutting-edge AI and VFX techniques.

seo.title: AI & VFX Fashion Film — Tara Devi
seo.description: An experimental fashion film exploring the intersection of AI generation and traditional film production.
seo.keywords: Fashion Film, VFX, AI, Film Production, Creative Direction, Tara Devi

description: An experimental short fashion film exploring the intersection of artificial intelligence, CGI, and traditional cinematography. Every frame was crafted to push the boundaries of what's visually possible in fashion storytelling.
plan: Storyboarded 12 scenes combining AI-generated and live-action footage
Sourced AI tools (Midjourney, Runway) and integrated with DaVinci Resolve pipeline
Scheduled a 2-day shoot with a minimal crew of 5
Delivered final cut and colour grade within a 3-week post-production window
strategy: Treated AI as a creative co-director rather than just a production shortcut
Used experimental transitions to blur the line between digital and physical realities
Released on Google Drive for direct sharing with potential brand collaborators

title: Script to Screen: Campaign Reels
note: Series of high-performing campaign reels scripted, directed, and produced from scratch.

seo.title: Script to Screen Campaign Reels — Tara Devi
seo.description: Campaign reels scripted, directed, and produced end-to-end for Citykart.
seo.keywords: Campaign Reels, Script Writing, Film Direction, Fashion, Tara Devi

description: Conceived, scripted, and directed a series of campaign reels for Citykart's seasonal launches. Managed full production cycles including casting, set design, styling, and post-production.
plan: Wrote scripts aligned with seasonal themes and campaign messaging
Held casting calls and coordinated with styling and set design teams
Directed on-set shoots across 4 seasonal campaigns in a single year
Oversaw editing, colour grading, and music licensing for final delivery
strategy: Kept each reel under 60 seconds to optimise for Instagram and YouTube Shorts
Used narrative arcs (problem → aspiration → resolution) to drive emotional engagement
A/B tested thumbnails and captions to maximise organic reach

title: Editorial Photoshoot Direction
note: Award-winning editorial photoshoots with meticulous attention to composition and light.

seo.title: Editorial Photoshoot Direction — Tara Devi
seo.description: Award-winning editorial photoshoot direction by Tara Devi.
seo.keywords: Photoshoot Direction, Art Direction, Fashion Photography, Best Photo Award, Tara Devi

description: Directed and art directed editorial photoshoots that earned the Best Photograph award. Each shoot was carefully planned with mood boards, lighting concepts, and detailed styling briefs.
plan: Created detailed mood boards drawing from fine art and editorial references
Developed lighting diagrams and location scouting notes for each concept
Briefed photographers, stylists, and MUAs with a unified visual direction
Selected and retouched final selects for print and digital submission
strategy: Prioritised authentic, unretouched skin and natural light to contrast over-produced industry norms
Submitted to competitions with strong conceptual narratives to stand out from technical-only entries
Archived every shoot into a structured portfolio for future brand pitches
